
```{=html}
<table class='game-table'>
<thead>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td colspan="3" align="center" class='game-label'><span data-qmd="$\color{#e69f00}B$"></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label td-nb'></td>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td class='game-label' align='center'>Corn</td>
  <td></td>
  <td class='game-label' align='center'>Taro</td>
</tr>
<tr class='td-nb'>
  <td rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: middle;" class='game-label td-nb'><span data-qmd="$\color{#0072b2}A$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-label'>Corn</td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$\color{#0072b2}\cancel{2}\color{black}{,} \color{#e69f00}\boxed{\mathbf{4}}$"></span></td>
  <td></td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$\color{#0072b2}\boxed{\mathbf{4}}\color{black}{,} \color{#e69f00}\cancel{3}$"></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label'>Taro</td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$\color{#0072b2}\boxed{\mathbf{5}}\color{black}{,} \color{#e69f00}\boxed{\mathbf{5}}$"></span></td>
  <td></td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$\color{#0072b2}\cancel{3}\color{black}{,} \color{#e69f00}\cancel{2}$"></span></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
```
